auth.wrongEmailOrPassword: you have entered a wrong Email/Password or both. Please check your information and try agin.

connection.checkAginOrBypass: Now you can either press Try Agin button Or press the Bypass button to do this operation in offline mode

syncSettingPage.autoSyncInTip:
You can set the rule for all section.
So if you set it to  always this will automatically Adjusts the others to always
syncSettingPage.tableAutoSyncInTip:
You can set the Sync rule for all tables in your apps.
if you set this the Auto sync option above will automatically adjusted to custom.
syncSettingPage.chartsAutoSyncInTip:
You can set the Sync rule for all charts in your apps.
if you set this the Auto sync option above will automatically adjusted to custom.
syncSettingPage.itemsAutoSyncInTip:
You can set the Sync rule for all Items and Categories in your apps.
if you set this the Auto sync option above will automatically adjusted to custom.
syncSettingPage.deliveryNameAutoSyncInTip:
You can set the Sync rule for all delivery names in your apps.
if you set this the Auto sync option above will automatically adjusted to custom.
syncSettingPage.deliveryLocationAutoSyncInTip:
You can set the Sync rule for all delivery locations in your apps.
if you set this the Auto sync option above will automatically adjusted to custom.
syncSettingPage.deliveryClientAutoSyncInTip:
You can set the Sync rule for all delivery clients in your apps.
if you set this the Auto sync option above will automatically adjusted to custom.
syncSettingPage.ruleAutoSyncInTip:
You can set the Sync rule for User Rules.
if you set this the Auto sync option above will automatically adjusted to custom.

accountSettingPage.yourAccountTip:
Your Account: This page contain settings for Your Account
like edit Your image.etc
accountSettingPage.teammatesAccountsTip:
Teammates Accounts: This Page for Control Your Teammate Accounts.
You need permissions to access this page.
accountSettingPage.deliveriesAccountsTip:
Deliveries Accounts: This Page for Control Deliveries Accounts.
You need permissions to access this page.
accountSettingPage.clientsAccountsTip:
Clients Accounts: This Page for Control Clients Account.
You need permissions to access this page.

generalSettingPage.youCanPressThisDividerToAddRules:
if You pressed This divider That Will add 3 input field 
for the name of new rule that will be added to This Group.
note:The default language drop down will also effect here.
generalSettingPage.youCanSetTheDefaultLanguageForOneTime:
You  can set the Default Language for one Time only.
ie. You cant change this later.
generalSettingPage.pressTheAddRuleDividerToActiveThis: Press The Add Rules divider To active this.

add.orPress: Or press to chose an image
add.imageUploadError: Error: we have a problem to take the image
add.imageTypeError: Error: you  can chose an image(png,jpg) only.
add.youCanPressThisDividerToAddOtherInfo: if You pressed This divider That Will add fields for other info.

imageSize: The image size must be 3MB or lower
pleasePressTheButtonBelowToTryAgin: Please press the button below To Try Agin
youAreOnline: Your current connection state is online. You can either press the Bypass to get data locally or press Try Agin button.
youAreOffline: Your current connection state is offline. You can either press the Bypass to get data from the Cloud or press Try Agin button.
youAreOnlineSet: Your current connection state is online. You can either press the Bypass to Set data locally or press Try Agin button.
youAreOfflineSet: Your current connection state is offline. You can either press the Bypass to Set data to the Cloud or press Try Agin button.
youAreWithoutInternet: Seams You didn't have Internet access. You can either press the Bypass to get data locally or press Try Agin button.
tryAginAndCancelBypass: You can press Try agin. That will reset the Bypass.

rules.canAcceptRequisiteFromAnotherUser: Can Accept Requisite From Another User

pressToAddHoldToRemoveAllExpectFirstOne: Press To add Hold To remove All expect First one
name: Name
offerPossibleSets:
If You set the start date and did not set the end Date that will make this offer active until You Edit it.
keep both empty if You Wont have offer or set both to have offer from start date to end date
pro tip the little button between the start data and the end date if You pressed it that will unSet the both date.
or long press on each to unset each one.
